channel.title: NatureEmergency on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in NatureEmergency on Nature Works

item.title: The Nature & Climate Emergency - what happens next?
item.description: The news is filled with stories from the Nature & Climate Emergency. http://localhost:1313/blog/230518-what-happens/

item.title: Dream-like cinema
item.description:
Cinema, like dreams, can help work through our lives

I watched World War Z with my teenaged son the other night. http://localhost:1313/blog/230306-dreams/

item.title: 1.5°C within 10-15 years
item.description:
This is remarkably bad news that hasn’t really hit the headlines

“@PNASNews suggests earth will cross the 1.5 degrees C temperature increase threshold in the next decade (within just 10 to 15 years) and is likely to exceed 2 degrees C by around 2060. http://localhost:1313/blog/230203-onepointfive/

item.title: DBIF
item.description:
An invaluable tool in the wildlife gardeners’ toolbox, The Database of Insects and their Food Plants details scientifically corroborated interactions between insects and plants

The Database of Insects and their Food Plants (DBIF for short) is a fantastic resource for wildlife gardeners. http://localhost:1313/dbif/
